agents.backend-specialist: Laravel 12 / PHP 8.3 — models, actions, services, jobs, policies
agents.database-specialist: PostgreSQL + Laravel migrations — schema, indexes, queries
agents.frontend-specialist: Livewire v3 + Blade — components, views, layouts (PT-BR text)
agents.security-specialist: Multi-tenant isolation, auth, policies, encryption, rate limiting
agents.appsec-specialist: OWASP Top 10, secure coding, XSS/SQLi/CSRF in Laravel/PHP
agents.vulnerability-analyst: Composer audit, CVE triage, dependency vulnerability management
agents.integration-specialist: Jira + GitHub Issues — queue jobs, webhooks, external APIs
agents.javascript-specialist: Alpine.js + Vite — client-side components, toast, file upload
agents.design-chief: Design orchestrator — routes to ux-specialist, ui-engineer, design-system-architect
agents.ux-specialist: UX decisions, user flows, accessibility, heuristics, Nielsen, WCAG
agents.design-system-architect: Design system tokens, Blade component library, pattern consistency
agents.ui-engineer: UI code production — Tailwind CSS + Alpine.js + Blade markup
agents.code-reviewer: Code review — DRY, strict_types, auth, security, language rules
agents.qa-specialist: QA — test coverage gaps, missing tests, suite execution and fixing
agents.hooks-architect: Claude Code hooks — pre/post tool-use, stop events, automation
agents.skill-craftsman: Creates new skills and slash commands in .claude/skills/
agents.customer-success-advisor: SaaS metrics — NRR, churn indicators, tenant health scoring
agents.analytics-advisor: Analytics KPIs, measurement frameworks, dashboard design

skills.create-livewire: Scaffold Livewire v3 component + Blade view pair
skills.create-migration: Generate PostgreSQL migration with indexes and FK constraints
skills.create-model: Generate Eloquent model with casts, relationships, scopes
skills.create-alpine-component: Create Alpine.js component exported for app.js
skills.review: Code review on changed/specified files — findings by severity
skills.qa: QA analysis — coverage gaps, missing tests, run suite, fix failures
skills.design-audit: Audit views against design system and UX heuristics
skills.design-flow: Design complete user flow before implementation
skills.design-system: Create/update/document design tokens and Blade component library
skills.accessibility-check: WCAG 2.1 AA audit of Blade views and Livewire components
skills.ui-build: Build UI from spec — Tailwind + Alpine.js + Blade production code
